query:
SELECT id, name, priority, sector, projectState, stageCode, productLane, DATE(createdAt) AS addedDate
FROM projects
WHERE DATE(createdAt) >= '2026-05-17'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT id, name, priority, sector, projectState, stageCode, productLane, DATE(createdAt) AS addedDate
FROM projects
WHERE DATE(createdAt) >= '2026-05-17'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
